api_key.description: Mention API key, sent as the raw Authorization header value (no Bearer prefix). Never logged.

base_url.description: Mention API base URL override for tests or proxies.

account_id.description: Mention account id. Legacy auto-discovers this from /accounts/me when unset; this bundle requires it explicitly since the engine has no pre-flight-lookup mechanism to derive a path segment from a prior response (see docs.md Known limits).

alert_id.description: Mention alert id, required only by the 'mention' and 'alert_tag' streams (used to build their path: accounts/{account_id}/alerts/{alert_id}/mentions|tags).

page_size.description: Records per page for paginated streams (1-1000).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
